header.title: Privacy Policy – Homii
header.intro: Homii ("we", "our", or "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application and services (the “Service”).

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.description: We may collect and process the following types of information:

a.title: a. Personal Information
items: Profile information provided by users or administrators

b.title: b. Residential & Access Information
items: Visitor records (name, entry time, purpose of visit)

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.description: We use the collected information to:
items: Provide and operate the Homii platform
Manage residential access and visitor registration
Generate and validate QR codes for entry
Allow administrators to monitor activity within communities
Improve app performance, security, and user experience
Communicate with users regarding updates, support, or important notifications

section3.title: 3. Sharing of Information
section3.description: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information only in the following cases:
items: With authorized residential administrators managing your community
With service providers that help us operate the platform (e.g., hosting, analytics)
If required by law, regulation, or legal process
To protect the safety, rights, or property of users or Homii

section4.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
section4.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including:
section4.conclusion: However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention
section5.description: We retain your information only as long as necessary to:
section5.conclusion: Administrators may have control over certain data within their residential system.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.description: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
section6.conclusion: To exercise these rights, contact us at: cesarlozano@optimmkt.com

section7.title: 7. Third-Party Services
section7.description: Homii may use third-party tools (e.g., analytics, cloud hosting). These providers may process data under their own privacy policies. We ensure that such providers follow appropriate data protection standards.

section8.title: 8. Children's Privacy
section8.description: Homii is not intended for use by children under the age of 13 (or equivalent minimum age in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect data from children.

section9.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
section9.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted within the app or on our website with an updated revision date.

section10.title: 10. Contact Us
section10.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, you can contact us at:

footer.agreement: By using Homii, you agree to this Privacy Policy.
